chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-323 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.1498/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1. 3. For orders on Misc. No.1499/2026. 4. For orders on Misc. No.1500/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2026. Mr. Ishaque Ahmed Khawaja, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, challenging an e-challan issued to him on the basis of a traffic violation. Having examined the matter, we are of the view that the Petitioner raises disputed questions of fact and does not disclose any ground that is justiciable within the contours of the writ jurisdiction of this Court. As such, the Petition is found to be misconceived, and, while granting the application for urgency, we accordingly dismiss the same in limine, along with the other Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
